reasoning: Both models skipped PKGBUILD due to misclassification as binary, preventing any security analysis. Without PKGBUILD review, package safety cannot be determined.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD (critical build script) was skipped by both models
Potential .install hooks or build scripts were never reviewed
false_negatives: All build/install risks (malicious commands, unsafe downloads) in PKGBUILD were missed

learnings: Fix binary file detection: PKGBUILD is always text
